name: Joanna Philbin's Final Exam Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and chocolate together.
2. Add the sugar to the melted mixture and stir until smooth.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time.
4. Mix in the flour, vanilla extract, mini marshmallows, chopped pecans, and half of the chocolate chips or M&M's.
5. Grease a 13x9 inch baking pan generously.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread it out evenly.
7. Sprinkle the remaining chocolate chips or M&M's on top of the batter.
8. Bake at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes, until set and golden brown.
Source: Live with Regis and Kathie Lee.
